subcodes.first_line: Say: O God, Possessor of existence and Educator of the hidden and the manifest! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which the sun hath shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا مالک الوجود و مربی الغیب و الشهود اسئلک باسمک الذی به اشرقت شمس
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @living waters; water of life, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
